plugins.name: google-ads-setup
plugins.description: Build a new Google Ads campaign end-to-end: research, structure, creative, and a polished assembled review workbook (and the RSA copy engine). Editor CSVs are produced from the confirmed workbook by google-ads-general's editor-csv-export.

plugins.name: google-ads-optimization
plugins.description: Optimize live Google Ads accounts: post-launch RSA asset-hygiene + search-terms analysis / negative-keyword mining, plus optimering-loop (the whole diagnose-to-workbook loop in one go: search-terms + asset-hygiene + Quality Score → one editable Excel workbook).

plugins.name: google-ads-general
plugins.description: General Google Ads deliverables: full audit reports (slide deck + PDF), change-log generation from Ads change-history, and editor-csv-export (confirmed review workbook -> Google Ads Editor import CSVs; reads both the campaign-build assembler and optimization-loop workbooks).
